message:
test(proptest): expand pane_tiers, telemetry, voi, ewma, hyperloglog to 37 tests

Add behavioral invariants: classify/current_tier consistency, promotion counting,
register idempotency, config accessor; histogram quantile(0)/quantile(1) bounds,
p95>=p50, aggregate cpu_percent=None; VOI above_threshold count, staleness_ms,
total_entropy sum, next_pane consistency; EWMA half_life_secs, is_anomaly/z_score
agreement, rate single event; HLL jaccard symmetry, nonzero_registers monotone,
clear+merge recovery, insert_hash total_inserts.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
